headline: How The Universal Health Services (UHS) Investment Story Is Shifting After Guidance And Buybacks
summary: The fair value price target for Universal Health Services was adjusted slightly from US$248.76 to US$247.35, reflecting a modest recalibration rather than a major shift in view. This change sits against a backdrop of mixed analyst commentary, where some are raising targets into the mid to high US$200s while others are cutting by double digit amounts after reviewing Q4 results, updated guidance, and policy exposure. Below, you will see how these differing views and the refreshed targets shape...

headline: UHS' Q1 Earnings Beat on Strong Behavioral Health Care Admissions
summary: Universal Health tops Q1 estimates as behavioral health admissions and patient days rise, driving revenue growth despite higher operating costs.

headline: UHS Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Marc D. Miller: Thank you, Darren.  Good morning to all participants on today's call, and thank you for your continued interest in Universal Health Services, Inc. The first quarter of 2026 featured significant acceleration in our behavioral health outpatient strategy with the announcement of the Talkspace acquisition and continued steady operating performance and cash flow generation in our core operations in the midst of more challenging seasonal volume trends.  Revenue growth for the first quarter was 9.6%.

headline: Universal Health Services Beat Raises Questions On Earnings Reliability Narrative
summary: Universal Health Services reported quarterly results with higher revenue and earnings in both its acute care and behavioral health segments. The latest quarter followed a prior period in which the company missed revenue expectations, pointing to an operational shift. Investors are watching how this performance influences views on the company’s execution in its core hospital and behavioral health operations. Universal Health Services (NYSE: UHS) is trading at $179.51, with the share price...
